name: Shopee platform qualification pack
change_note: Migrated from script PLATFORM_HINTS into a composable platform pack.
checklist_hints: Check marketplace-site seller eligibility, prohibited/restricted products, brand authorization, and local category rules.

requirements.requirement: Verify current Shopee country-site seller eligibility, prohibited/restricted products, brand/IP, and category qualification requirements.
requirements.decision_effect: Cannot approve Shopee cases until the exact country-site policy route is verified.
requirements.notes: Do not generalize one Shopee country site's rules to another.

sources.title: Shopee PH Help Center: Shopee Terms of Service
sources.confirms: Shopee terms require sellers to comply with Shopee rules, terms, and prohibited/restricted item policies.

sources.title: Shopee MY Seller Education Hub: List of Prohibited Items
sources.confirms: Shopee Malaysia prohibited listings are not allowed due to local regulations or Shopee listing policy.

sources.title: Shopee PH Seller Education Hub: What are prohibited listings?
sources.confirms: Shopee Philippines prohibited listings are products not allowed due to local regulations or Shopee listing policy.

sources.title: Shopee PH Seller Education Hub: Shopee's Policies
sources.confirms: Shopee country-site seller education provides policy routing for listing limits, listing violations, and seller policy compliance.

gaps: Seed pack: verify current official Shopee policy pages per case before final decisions.
